// 01

About Me

I'm Abhirup Payne, a Cybersecurity student pursuing a B.Sc. in Advanced Networking & Cyber Security at Brainware University. My journey is defined by relentless curiosity — understanding how systems work, and how they break.

As a junior penetration tester and vulnerability researcher, I use Kali Linux to identify weaknesses in controlled environments, practising the offensive skills that build stronger defences.

Beyond security, I craft frontend web experiences with a security-first mindset and specialise in AI prompt engineering to unlock the full potential of large language models.

Gathering knowledge is the key to success — and I intend to never stop gathering.

Analytical ThinkerEthical Hacker Mindset Continuous LearnerTechnical Documentation Security-First DesignProblem Solver🏏 1st Div Cricketer🏊 Bengal Swimmer
